# Gabriel Ceicoschi, gceico.me

> Personal site of Gabriel Ceicoschi: Senior Software Engineer, AI-agent builder, and AI-workshop instructor based in Tilburg, Netherlands. Blog, portfolio, and CV.

## Who is Gabriel Ceicoschi

Gabriel Ceicoschi is a Senior Software Engineer who builds AI agents, focusing on making AI accessible through user experience, privacy, and security (retrieval-augmented generation and agentic workflows). He is the founder of Aibl.to, running hands-on AI workshops where teams in the Netherlands build AI agents on their real workflows (300+ professionals trained across 20+ companies, including ASML and LocHal Tilburg). He started as a programmer, moved into UI/UX design, and now builds AI agents, and he writes about AI on LinkedIn. Based in Tilburg, Netherlands.

## Site sections

- Home (https://gceico.me/): intro, latest posts, portfolio, and CV.
- Posts (https://gceico.me/posts): all blog articles.
- Portfolio: selected projects (Aibl.to AI workshops, HALO, "Claude, make it rain" Claude Code spend tracker, Freelancer work).
- CV: education, experience, skills, and tools.

## Posts

- Every Claude Code Trick I know, https://gceico.me/posts/every-claude-code-trick-i-know
- Saying yes to Claude Code OpenTelemetry, https://gceico.me/posts/saying-yes-to-claude-code-opentelemetry

## Projects and tools

- claude-make-it-rain, open-source Claude Code spend tracker: https://github.com/gceico/claude-make-it-rain
- departijwijzer.nl, Dutch political-information chatbot (RAG over party manifestos), co-built with Hugo de Vries.
